create: Build a task tracker. Tasks have a title and notes. Use callAI to auto-tag each task with 1-3 short topical tags when it's created or its notes change. Use callAI to suggest 2-4 subtasks for any task on demand via a button. Persist tasks, tags, and subtasks in Fireproof.
edits: Add a status field (todo/doing/done) with a kanban-style column view. Tasks should be draggable between columns and the status should persist in Fireproof.
Add a tag cloud at the top showing every tag with a count, and clicking a tag filters the visible tasks to ones with that tag.
Add a 'similar tasks' panel that uses callAI to find the 2-3 existing tasks most semantically related to the currently-selected task.

create: Build a kanban board with three columns (Backlog, In Progress, Done). Each card has a title and description. Use callAI to score each card 1-5 for priority on creation, displayed as filled circles. Persist cards in Fireproof.
edits: Add duplicate detection: a button that uses callAI to find pairs of cards that look like duplicates and offers to merge them.
Add a per-column filter for priority — only show cards above a slider threshold.
When a card moves to Done, use callAI to suggest one short follow-up card and offer to add it to Backlog.

create: Build a recipe book. Each recipe has a name, ingredient list, and steps. Use callAI to suggest substitutions for any ingredient on demand. Persist recipes in Fireproof.
edits: Add a weekly meal plan view with 7 day slots. Drag a recipe into a slot to plan it. Plans persist in Fireproof.
Generate a shopping list from the current week's plan, deduplicated and grouped by ingredient category (callAI groups them).
Add a 'cook this' button that walks the user step-by-step with a next/prev control and persists which step they're on.

create: Build a daily journaling app. Each entry has a date and free-form text. Use callAI to tag the entry's sentiment (one of: bright/neutral/heavy) when saved. Persist entries in Fireproof.
edits: Add a weekly summary button that uses callAI to write a 3-sentence reflection on the past 7 entries.
Show a small calendar heatmap where each day's color reflects its sentiment tag.
Add a search box that does semantic search across entries via callAI (not just substring match).

create: Build a bookmark manager. Each bookmark has a URL, title, and notes. Use callAI to cluster bookmarks into topic groups on demand. Persist bookmarks in Fireproof.
edits: When a bookmark is added, use callAI to estimate read time in minutes from the title and notes, displayed as a badge.
Add a 'related bookmarks' panel for the selected bookmark, populated via callAI.
Add an export-to-markdown button that produces a topic-grouped reading list.

create: Build a meeting notes app. Each note has a title, date, and body. Use callAI to extract action items from the body and display them as a checklist. Persist notes and action items in Fireproof.
edits: Add follow-up reminders: each action item has a due date, and overdue ones surface in a top banner.
Add a person tagging feature — @mentions in notes are extracted via callAI into a per-person view of their commitments.
Generate a 'what was decided' summary for the selected meeting via callAI.

create: Build a reading list. Books have a title, author, and status (want/reading/finished). Use callAI to write a 2-sentence summary when a book is added. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add reading sessions: each session logs date, pages read, and notes. Show total progress per book.
Add 'what to read next' that uses callAI to suggest a next book from the want-to-read pile based on recently-finished books.
Add a yearly stats view: books finished, total pages, top genres (callAI infers genre).

create: Build a workout log. Each entry has a date, exercise name, sets, and reps. Use callAI to suggest a small progression (more reps or weight) for the next session of the same exercise. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add a 'form cue' button per exercise that uses callAI to retrieve a one-line technique reminder.
Add charts showing volume per exercise over the last 8 weeks.
Add a weekly plan view: drag exercises onto days; callAI flags imbalances (e.g. all push, no pull).

create: Build an expense tracker. Each expense has an amount, merchant, and date. Use callAI to assign a category on creation. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add monthly budgets per category. Show progress bars and use callAI to flag anomalies (categories trending over budget).
Add a 'recurring expense' detector: callAI groups likely recurring charges and offers to mark them as subscriptions.
Add a CSV import that pipes each row through callAI for categorization.

create: Build a gardening journal. Each plant has a name, location, and a log of dated observations. Use callAI to suggest care tips when an observation is added. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add a seasonal task generator: callAI produces this week's tasks based on the current season and the user's plants.
Add photo-style entries (just a caption + date for now) and let callAI summarize plant progress over time.
Add a 'plant compatibility' check that callAI runs when adding a new plant near existing ones.

create: Build a language flashcards app. Each card has a term and translation. Use callAI to generate one example sentence per card. Persist cards in Fireproof.
edits: Add a study mode: show term, click to reveal translation, mark easy/medium/hard. Difficulty persists per card.
Use difficulty to schedule reviews — only show cards due today. callAI grades a free-form recall attempt.
Add a 'generate set' button that takes a topic and produces 10 new flashcards via callAI.

create: Build a contact CRM. Each contact has a name, role, and a log of interactions (date + note). Use callAI to score relationship strength 1-10 from interaction frequency and tone. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add 'who should I follow up with' that surfaces contacts with stale interactions and uses callAI to draft a one-line message.
Add tags per contact and a tag-based filter; callAI suggests tags from the interaction log.
Add a per-contact summary that callAI regenerates whenever interactions change.

create: Build a pantry inventory. Each item has a name, quantity, and unit. Use callAI to suggest 3 recipes possible from current pantry contents. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add expiration tracking and a 'use soon' panel that callAI prioritizes by what to cook with first.
When pantry contents change, regenerate the recipe suggestions automatically.
Add a shopping-list mode: pick a recipe and the missing ingredients are added to a separate list.

create: Build a habit tracker. Each habit has a name and a per-day done/not-done log. Show streaks. Use callAI to generate one short coaching line for the longest active streak. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add habit stacking: callAI suggests a tiny habit to attach to an existing strong streak.
Add a weekly review: callAI summarizes consistency and recommends one habit to drop or modify.
Add a 'cold start' wizard that asks 3 questions and uses callAI to propose 3 starter habits.

create: Build a dream journal. Each entry has a date and a description. Use callAI to extract symbols and one possible interpretation when saved. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add a recurring-symbol view that lists symbols sorted by frequency across all entries.
Add a 'pattern of the week' summary via callAI.
Add mood tagging — callAI assigns one mood label per entry and shows a mood timeline.

create: Build a travel itinerary planner. A trip has a destination and a date range. Each day can have planned activities. Use callAI to suggest 3 activities for any selected day. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add a packing list generator that uses callAI based on destination, dates, and current activities.
Add a budget tracker per trip with categories (lodging, food, transit, activities).
Add a daily-wrap-up note: at the end of each day, prompt for a short reflection; callAI summarizes the trip on demand.

create: Build a code-snippet vault. Each snippet has a title, language, and code body. Use callAI to suggest 1-3 tags per snippet on creation. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add semantic search: query box uses callAI to find the most relevant snippets, not just substring match.
Add a 'similar snippets' panel for the open snippet, populated via callAI.
Add a quick-explain button that callAI uses to write a one-paragraph plain-English description of the snippet.

create: Build a music practice log. Each session has a date, instrument, exercise, and duration. Use callAI to suggest the next exercise based on recent sessions. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add a 'piece progress' view: track which pieces are being learned and notes per practice on each.
Add a weekly goal: minutes per instrument; show progress bars and let callAI suggest a goal for next week.
Add a tempo log per exercise (BPM over time) with a small chart.

create: Build a gift-idea tracker. Each recipient has a name and a profile (interests, recent gifts). Use callAI to suggest 3 gift ideas per recipient on demand. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add an occasion-based view: birthdays/holidays per recipient, with reminders surfaced on the home screen.
Add a budget per recipient and have callAI tailor suggestions to it.
Add a 'gifts given' history per recipient that callAI uses to avoid duplicate suggestions.

create: Build a daily standup log. Each entry has a date and three fields: yesterday, today, blockers. Use callAI to detect repeat blockers (mentioned in 3+ recent entries) and surface them. Persist in Fireproof.
edits: Add a weekly summary that callAI generates from the last 5 entries.
Add team-mate mode: multiple named members each have their own log; show a combined dashboard.
Add a 'commitments' view that extracts from 'today' fields what was promised and checks against next-day 'yesterday' fields.

create: Build a metronome web app. The user can set a BPM (40-240) and beats-per-bar (2/3/4/6), tap a Start button to begin clicking, and Stop to halt. Use the Web Audio API for accurate audio-clock scheduling with lookahead. Persist BPM and beats-per-bar in Fireproof so they restore on reload.
edits: Add a tap-tempo button: tap repeatedly to set BPM from the average inter-tap interval over the last 4 taps.
Add per-beat accent: the downbeat is a higher-pitched click than the other beats, with separate adjustable pitches.
Add a session log: every Start/Stop is recorded with BPM and duration; persist in Fireproof and show a small history list.
